item.title: Version 1.4.0
item.description:
What's New in Plotted 1.4.0

A major UX revamp plus full read/write to Apple Reminders.

Reminder write actions

  • Tap a Today row to mark complete (or uncomplete a completed one).
  • "+" button on each tracker logs today's session in one click.
  • Toolbar "+" (⌘N) opens a New Reminder sheet — title, list, due date, repeat, notes.
  • Right-click any row or tracker for Edit and Delete with confirmation.

Trackers tab — narrative redesign

  • New side-by-side card layout: weekday calendar on the left, prominent stats column on the right.
  • "X days since last session" warning when a habit goes quiet.
  • Pattern-gap detection: surfaces weekdays a habit never lands on (e.g. "Never on Thu").
  • Today's cell now wears a green ring on every tracker grid.
  • Date-window pill in the header so you always know the data range.

Frequency targets

  • Set a target per habit: 1×–6× / week or Daily.
  • The big number flips to a rate % ("75% of target") with a "9 of 12 expected" sub-line.
  • Inline pill picker — green when on track, amber under 50%.

Home tab

  • Big serif date header with this-week stats and a Weekday Rhythm chip row.
  • Keystone Habit card highlights the habit with the most positive impact.
  • Today section redesigned with a progress-bar header and tappable checkboxes.

Insights & System

  • Weekly Digest: a natural-language summary of the past week.
  • Habit DNA: peak hours, consistency, and velocity in one glance.
  • System tab now opens with a serif identity statement and a "Your system at a glance" narrative card.

List filtering

  • Per-list toggle in Settings to exclude reminder lists from the app, heatmap, and intelligence.

Other

  • Dormant Nudges in Trackers when a habit goes silent.
  • Sort modes (Most done, A–Z, By list, Recent activity), persisted between launches.

item.title: Version 1.3.2
item.description:
What's New in Plotted 1.3.2

  • Fixed: widgets now register with macOS again. Restored the App Sandbox entitlement on the widget extension, which is required for chronod to launch the extension. Heatmap, Tracker, Streak, Today, and Week-Compare widgets are usable from Notification Center and the desktop.
  • Properly code-signed with hardened runtime.

item.title: Version 1.3.1
item.description:
What's New in Plotted 1.3.1

  • Trackers: fixed overlapping month labels on the mini heatmap (no more "MarApr").
  • System: correct pluralization in the Capacity card ("1 goal" / "1 habit" instead of "1 goals" / "1 habits").
  • Insights: improved contrast on locked achievement names and descriptions for readability.

item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description:
What's New in Plotted 1.2.0

  • Automatic updates via Sparkle — the app now checks for updates and installs them seamlessly
  • "Check for Updates…" menu item under the Plotted menu
